verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Surely goodness and mercy Shall follow me, All the days, All the days of my life. Surely goodness and mercy Shall follow me, All the days, all the days of my life.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: And I shall dwell in the house Of the Lord forever, And I shall feast at the table Spread for me, Surely goodness and mercy Shall follow me, All the days, all the days of my life.
